recommendations.title: Humanoids from the Deep
recommendations.overview: After a new cannery introduces scientifically augmented salmon to a seaside town in the Pacific Northwest, a species of mysterious, mutated sea creatures begin killing the men and raping the women.

recommendations.title: Ticks
recommendations.overview: Teens camping in a northern California retreat are terrorized by mutant insects created by evil, polluting pot farmers.

recommendations.title: The Lost World
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Drama, Romance, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: The first film adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's classic novel about a land where prehistoric creatures still roam.

recommendations.title: Sea Fever
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Horror, Drama, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler—marooned at sea—struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

recommendations.title: Z
recommendations.overview: A family find themselves terrorized by their eight-year-old son's imaginary friend.

recommendations.title: Avalanche Sharks
recommendations.genres: Horror, Action, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: A snow avalanche awakens humungous, prehistoric sharks that proceed to chomp on bikini clad co-eds.

recommendations.title: It Came from Beneath the Sea
recommendations.overview: A giant octopus, whose feeding habits have been affected by radiation from H-Bomb tests, rises from the Mindanao Deep to terrorize the California Coast.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Children of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Six children are found spread through out the world that not only have enormous intelligence, but identical intelligence and have a strange bond to each other.

recommendations.title: The Sand
recommendations.overview: After an all-night graduation beach party, a group of hung-over students wakes up under the blazing sun to find their numbers somewhat depleted. An enormous alien creature has burrowed down deep and anyone foolish enough to make contact with the sand
